requirement_topic.en: Local Cameroonian Importer / Authorised Agent Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: 当地喀麦隆进口商/授权代理要求
requirement_topic.zht: 當地喀麥隆進口商/授權代理要求

summary.en: Importation of telecommunications and electronic equipment into Cameroon requires engagement of a locally registered Cameroonian importer or authorised agent (a company incorporated under Cameroonian law). The Cameroonian importer is the responsible party for customs clearance, payment of import duties and taxes to DGI (Direction Générale des Impôts) and douanes (customs), and compliance with ART homologation requirements at the point of import. The importer must hold valid business registration (registre du commerce) and relevant import licences. Foreign manufacturers or exporters cannot import directly without a local registered entity. Products must carry bilingual French and English labelling as required by Cameroon's official bilingual status. ANTIC (Agence Nationale des Technologies de l'Information et de la Communication) may also require registration of certain ICT equipment or services.
summary.zh: 向喀麦隆进口电信及电子设备须委托在当地注册的喀麦隆进口商或授权代理（依喀麦隆法律注册成立的公司）。喀麦隆进口商是办理海关清关、向DGI（税务总局）和海关缴纳进口税费，以及在进口环节满足ART同质化要求的责任方。进口商须持有有效的工商注册（商业登记）及相关进口许可证。外国制造商或出口商不得在无当地注册实体的情况下直接进口。产品须按喀麦隆官方双语国家要求采用法英双语标注。ANTIC（国家信息通信技术局）亦可能要求对特定ICT设备或服务进行注册。
summary.zht: 向喀麥隆進口電信及電子設備須委託在當地注冊的喀麥隆進口商或授權代理（依喀麥隆法律注冊成立的公司）。喀麥隆進口商是辦理海關清關、向DGI（稅務總局）和海關繳納進口稅費，以及在進口環節滿足ART同質化要求的責任方。進口商須持有有效的工商注冊（商業登記）及相關進口許可證。外國製造商或出口商不得在無當地注冊實體的情況下直接進口。產品須按喀麥隆官方雙語國家要求採用法英雙語標注。ANTIC（國家信息通信技術局）亦可能要求對特定ICT設備或服務進行注冊。

standards_or_laws: Loi n°2010/013 du 21 décembre 2010 régissant les communications électroniques au Cameroun (importer obligations)
Cameroonian commercial code (registre du commerce requirements)
ART homologation regulations (local importer as responsible entity)
ANTIC (Agence Nationale des Technologies de l'Information et de la Communication) ICT registration
Bilingual labelling: French and English (official languages of Cameroon)

summary.en: China does not require a local importer or agent for domestic market sales; MIIT/SRRC/CCC approvals are obtained directly by the manufacturer or an authorised testing agent. There is no equivalent 'local importer' regulatory requirement in the Chinese domestic compliance framework. For Chinese manufacturers exporting to Cameroon, the local Cameroonian importer or agent must be engaged to fulfil all in-country regulatory and customs obligations.
summary.zh: 中国境内市场销售无需当地进口商或代理；MIIT/SRRC/CCC认可由制造商或授权检测代理直接取得。中国境内合规框架中没有相应的「当地进口商」监管要求。中国制造商向喀麦隆出口时，须委托当地喀麦隆进口商或代理，以履行所有在国监管及海关义务。
summary.zht: 中國境內市場銷售無需當地進口商或代理；MIIT/SRRC/CCC認可由製造商或授權檢測代理直接取得。中國境內合規框架中沒有相應的「當地進口商」監管要求。中國製造商向喀麥隆出口時，須委託當地喀麥隆進口商或代理，以履行所有在國監管及海關義務。

standards_or_laws: MIIT / SRRC / CCC approvals (manufacturer-direct in China)
No local importer requirement in Chinese domestic compliance framework

gap.en: Full gap: Chinese domestic compliance framework has no equivalent local importer requirement. Chinese manufacturers exporting wireless or telecom equipment to Cameroon must engage a legally registered Cameroonian importer or agent. The importer bears responsibility for ART homologation verification at import, customs duties, and bilingual labelling compliance. ANTIC ICT registration obligations should also be verified.
gap.zh: 完全差距：中国境内合规框架无相应的当地进口商要求。中国制造商向喀麦隆出口无线或电信设备时，须委托依法注册的喀麦隆进口商或代理。进口商承担进口环节ART同质化验证、关税及法英双语标注合规的责任。还应核实ANTIC ICT注册义务。
gap.zht: 完全差距：中國境內合規框架無相應的當地進口商要求。中國製造商向喀麥隆出口無線或電信設備時，須委託依法注冊的喀麥隆進口商或代理。進口商承擔進口環節ART同質化驗證、關稅及法英雙語標注合規的責任。還應核實ANTIC ICT注冊義務。

source.publisher: ART — Agence de Régulation des Télécommunications (Cameroun)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A locally registered Cameroonian importer or authorised agent is required for import of wireless and telecom equipment into Cameroon. The importer is responsible for ART homologation compliance at customs, payment of import duties to DGI/douanes, and ensuring bilingual French and English labelling. Chinese manufacturers must establish a Cameroonian importer relationship before exporting.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向喀麦隆进口无线和电信设备须有在当地注册的喀麦隆进口商或授权代理。进口商负责在海关环节满足ART同质化合规要求、向DGI/海关缴纳进口税，并确保法英双语标注。中国制造商须在出口前建立喀麦隆进口商关系。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向喀麥隆進口無線和電信設備須有在當地注冊的喀麥隆進口商或授權代理。進口商負責在海關環節滿足ART同質化合規要求、向DGI/海關繳納進口稅，並確保法英雙語標注。中國製造商須在出口前建立喀麥隆進口商關係。
